summary: Comprehensive testing of deployment date as single source of truth, new deployment structure, shift classification from user selection, Live Dashboard date/shift display, and Inventory Transfer functionality. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright - Transfer Item button visible for Admin, dialog works correctly, Live Dashboard shows correct date and morning/night hours.

issues: React warning: Duplicate keys found for items like 'Glove Left with Dongle', 'Head Camera', etc. in SelectContent. Items with same name appear multiple times causing key conflicts.
Minor accessibility warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (not affecting functionality)

action_items: Fix duplicate key warning in Inventory.js - use unique item ID or index for SelectItem keys instead of item_name
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Deployment model has morning_managers and evening_managers fields (new structure)
✓ One deployment per BnB per date enforced - duplicate creation returns 400 error
✓ Collection records store shift from user selection via /api/shifts/start (not inferred from time)
✓ Collection record date comes from deployment.date (single source of truth, not timestamp)
✓ Live Dashboard date from deployment.date - shows 'Friday, March 20, 2026'
✓ Live Dashboard shows Morning/Night hours per BnB (from record's shift field)
✓ Transfer Item button visible for Admin in Inventory header
✓ Transfer dialog has: item selection, from/to location types, notes field, submit button
✓ Transfer event creates event and updates item location (tested via API)
✓ All 5 inventory tabs working: Distribution, Hub, Kit-wise, BnB-level, Movement Log
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created temporary test items and deployments for testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key changes verified: 1) Deployment model has morning_managers/evening_managers (one deployment per BnB per date). 2) Collection records store shift from request body (user selection). 3) deployment.date is single source of truth - collection record.date copied from deployment.date. 4) Live Dashboard queries by deployment_id and shows Morning/Night hours from record's shift field. 5) Transfer Item button in Inventory header for Admin with bulk-transfer dialog.
passed_tests: Frontend: Inventory page loads with header 'Inventory - 44 items tracked' - VERIFIED
Frontend: Transfer Item button visible for Admin in header - VERIFIED
Frontend: Transfer dialog opens with item selection, from/to locations, notes - VERIFIED
Frontend: All 5 inventory tabs present and clickable - VERIFIED
Frontend: Movement Log shows recent transfers - VERIFIED
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows date 'Friday, March 20, 2026' - VERIFIED
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows Morning/Night hours per BnB - VERIFIED
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows kit status badges (Idle) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Distribution table shows item counts by category and location - VERIFIED
features_verified: Deployment date - collection records use deployment.date NOT timestamp
Deployment structure - one deployment per BnB per date (no shift duplication)
Shift classification - shift is stored from user selection on collection start
Live Dashboard - shows correct date from deployment
Live Dashboard - morning/night hours use record's shift field
Inventory Transfer button - visible for Admin in header
Inventory Transfer - opens dialog with item selection, from/to locations, notes
Transfer event - creates event and updates item location
